name: On the Rainbow Dragon
description:
You are standing on the Rainbow Dragon, surrounded by many beams of coloured
light.  The Rainbow Dragon extends above and below you as far as you can see.

exits.description:
The Rainbow Dragon extends far above you.  You see a glowing white light at the
Rainbow Dragon's end.
The Rainbow Dragon extends far below you, slowly fading into darkness.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Rainbow Dragon brightly glows with beams of light, in colours that defie an
description.
